prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic romantic mirror-selfie portrait of a young South Asian couple sharing an affectionate moment inside a modern luxury apartment bedroom. The woman stands in front, leaning into the man while holding a silver triple-camera smartphone up to the mirror with one hand; her other arm wraps around his neck. The man stands slightly behind and to her right, wrapping one arm protectively around her waist and leaning close behind her. Their faces are intentionally obscured by a soft square blur centered over both faces, while the rest of the image is crisp and realistic. The woman has long dark wavy hair, wears a cozy beige ribbed knit sweater and black pants; the man has thick dark hair, light stubble, and wears a casual beige linen button-up shirt with sleeves rolled up. Frame the scene vertically as a bathroom or vanity mirror selfie with a gold metal mirror frame visible along the right edge and bottom, a marble counter and chrome faucet at the bottom foreground, and a small white sparkle icon in the lower right corner. In the background, show exactly five main room elements: a neatly made white bed with pillows on the right, beige floor-to-ceiling curtains, large bright windows with a soft city skyline view, a glass shower or wardrobe panel on the left, and a warm recessed tray ceiling with subtle downlights. Use natural daylight mixed with warm interior lighting, soft shadows, realistic skin tones, detailed fabric texture, luxurious hotel-suite atmosphere, shallow smartphone-photo depth, authentic mirror reflections, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
